name: nwmiws-platform
description: Business-oriented platform workspace for the NW Michigan watershed applications

scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage:admin-web && npm run test:coverage:platform-api && npm run test:coverage:portal-web
scripts.validate:portal-platform: npm run lint --workspace @nwmiws/portal-web && npm run lint --workspace nwmiws-platform-api && npm run test:coverage:portal-web && npm run test:coverage:platform-api && npm run build --workspace nwmiws-platform-api && npm run test:e2e
